title: Add API rate limiting
original_text: Implemented API rate limiting to prevent abuse. Added token bucket algorithm for rate limiting. Implemented per-user and per-IP rate limits. Added rate limit headers in API responses. Implemented rate limit exceeded responses with retry-after. Added rate limit analytics and monitoring. Implemented rate limit bypass for admin users. Added tests for rate limiting. Result: 29 tests pass.
expected_subject: feat(api): add rate limiting to prevent abuse
expected_body_lines: - Implement token bucket algorithm for rate limiting
- Add per-user and per-IP rate limits
- Add rate limit headers in API responses
- Add rate limit analytics and admin bypass
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(api): add rate limiting to prevent abuse"
